privileged_info_summary: The task creates a mid-season baseball report for the Tri-City ValleyCats in Apache OpenOffice Writer. The input data is synthetic, created inline in setup_task.sh as JSON containing 12 position players and 8 pitchers. All verified required player names (Espinoza, Hawkins, Branson, Pittman, Fuentes) are present in the JSON. All required stat values (.302, 2.45, 14, 3.12) correspond to actual player statistics in the generated JSON. The output file must be at least 5KB and contain at least 5 Heading 1s, 6 Heading 2s, and 2 data tables. Input file: /home/ga/Documents/team_stats_2024.json. Output file: /home/ga/Documents/ValleyCats_MidSeason_2024.odt.
